meta.name: Saudi Ventures Intelligence — Source Registry
meta.description: Public web sources for collecting Saudi/MENA startup & venture data. Scrape-oriented (no APIs). Each entry documents what data is rendered on-page, how to crawl it, and reliability of dates.

field_glossary.data_type: what records you extract from the page
field_glossary.render_mode: static (plain HTTP fetch works) | js (needs headless browser)
field_glossary.date_reliability: high (explicit publish date on page) | low (no/uncertain date) | none
field_glossary.scrape_risk: low | medium | high — check robots.txt + terms before automating

sources.name: MENAbytes
sources.notes: Richest per-deal granularity. One post = one deal. Good primary feed for Lead/entity enrichment.

sources.name: Wamda — Funding feed
sources.coverage: MENA + KSA, deal stories + monthly funding roundups
sources.notes: Monthly MENA reports (collab with Digital Digest) break out Saudi totals. URL pattern is date-based: /YYYY/MM/slug — easy to enumerate.

sources.name: Wamda — Monthly report example
sources.coverage: Monthly MENA funding totals with KSA split
sources.notes: Template for crawling the monthly series. Source of market-size / trend stats.

sources.name: MAGNiTT — News
sources.coverage: Most authoritative MENA/KSA venture data; 34,800+ startups, 22,500+ rounds, 1,300+ exits (platform-wide)
sources.notes: Deep data is paid; free news/report pages carry dated headline stats. STRICT terms on automated access — verify before scraping. JS-rendered.

sources.name: MAGNiTT — Research index
sources.coverage: KSA quarterly/annual VC reports (sponsored by SVC)
sources.notes: Use for report discovery + summary figures. Full datasets are gated.

sources.name: ecosystemsa.com — VCs module
sources.notes: The directory referenced in your build file. Slow-changing reference data — re-crawl on schedule, no per-record dates.

sources.name: ecosystemsaudi.com (official portal)
sources.coverage: Official Saudi ecosystem portal (operated by StartupBlink)
sources.notes: Authoritative on government funds/programs (NTDP, PIF, Jada, Flat6Labs) + StartupBlink ranking data.

sources.name: NTDP
sources.coverage: National Technology Development Program — Saudi Unicorns, MVPLab, support tracks

sources.name: MCIT — News
sources.coverage: Ministry of Communications & IT — policy, program launches
sources.notes: Dated official announcements. Good for policy/initiative context.

sources.name: IncubatorList — Saudi VCs
sources.notes: Includes ticket-size ranges and HQ. Reference data.

sources.name: IncubatorList — Saudi accelerators/incubators
sources.notes: Has program deadlines — one of the few directories with semi-time-sensitive fields.

sources.name: Hussein Attar — Saudi accelerators
sources.notes: Good city-level + backing-org detail for accelerators.

sources.name: Vision2030.ai — Encyclopedia (incubators/accelerators)
sources.coverage: Monsha'at, Flat6Labs, KAUST/TAQADAM, Badir, university programs
sources.notes: Narrative profiles — useful for description/blurb enrichment.

sources.name: Rasmal — Saudi accelerators/VCs guide
sources.coverage: Saudi accelerators/incubators with program + grant detail
sources.notes: Has grant-size and program specifics (e.g. The Garage, GAIA).

unverified_sources.note: Referenced from general knowledge, NOT confirmed in this search session. Verify the exact URL and on-page structure before wiring into the collector.

collection_guidance.date_handling: News feeds (MENAbytes, Wamda, MCIT) expose explicit publish dates — use for published_at. Directories have no per-record dates — treat as slow-changing reference data, store a crawled_at timestamp instead.
collection_guidance.dedup: Same round often appears across MENAbytes, Wamda, and the VC's own release within days. Key on (company + amount + round_stage) and keep earliest source_date as published_at, official release as confirmed_at.
collection_guidance.render_modes: Sites marked render_mode=js (MAGNiTT, ecosystemsa.com, ecosystemsaudi.com) need a headless browser. Static sites work with a plain HTTP fetch.
collection_guidance.compliance: Check each site's robots.txt and terms before automating. MAGNiTT (scrape_risk=high) restricts automated access — prefer their free downloadable report PDFs over scraping the live platform.
collection_guidance.your_own_sources: AVO Board (avo-board.vercel.app?domain=market|radar&view=ecosystem) is owned by you — pull directly rather than scraping, per your build file.
